title: StatefulSet Basics — OnDelete
text:
You select this update strategy for a StatefulSet by setting the
.spec.updateStrategy.type
to
OnDelete
.
Patch the
web
StatefulSet to use the
OnDelete
update strategy:
kubectl patch statefulset web -p
'{"spec":{"updateStrategy":{"type":"OnDelete", "rollingUpdate": null}}}'
statefulset.apps/web patched
When you select this update strategy, the StatefulSet controller does not
automatically update Pods when a modification is made to the StatefulSet's
.spec.template
field. You need to manage the rollout yourself - either
manually, or using separate automation.
